title: UltraCart BigQuery Skill Configuration
description: Configuration for the UltraCart BigQuery Claude Code skill. Located at .ultracart-bq.json in the project root or home directory.

$schema.description: Reference to this schema for editor validation

default_merchant.description: The merchant ID to use when no --merchant flag is provided

merchants.description: Per-merchant configuration. Keys are merchant IDs.

default_output_dir.description: Directory where report output folders are created

output_format.description: Default output format for chart rendering

chart_theme.description: ECharts theme name to apply to all visualizations

chart_defaults.description: Default chart dimensions and rendering settings

llm.description: LLM provider configuration for analysis and schema filtering

provider.description: LLM provider to use for analysis and schema filtering

api_key_env.description: Environment variable name containing the API key

analysis_model.description: Model to use for report analysis generation

schema_filter_model.description: Model to use for LLM-powered schema filtering

taxonomy_level.description: The data access taxonomy level assigned to this user by the UltraCart administrator. Determines which views are available for querying.

dataset.description: The BigQuery dataset name containing the streaming tables and views

external_projects.description: External GCP projects the merchant has access to

datasets.description: Map of dataset name to array of table names available to the skill
